meta.definition: Sprint 19 = all rows with Target Sprint == '19' (feature tasks + registered ENG-OPS-002 remediation family).
meta.note: Task prompt cited 597 tasks (pre-ENG-OPS-002); origin/main now has 616 rows after #599/#600 registered ENG-OPS-002 + R01-R18 (19 rows).

criticalPath.note: IFC-033 (k6 load test) -> IFC-034 (Gate 3 £3000 review). Preserved. IFC-033 deps IFC-030 (Completed/S17) + IFC-032 (Completed/S18) both satisfied -> IFC-033 is READY.

completedTasks.description: Lighthouse audit on authenticated home page - verify NFR targets TTI <1s Performance >=90 Accessibility >=90
completedTasks.dod: Lighthouse CI audit on / route; Performance >=90, Accessibility >=90, TTI <1s; results saved to artifacts; ADR-027 verification confirmed

completedTasks.description: AI chains for contacts + accounts (PG-182/PG-183 follow-up) — wire the remaining AI toggles on both entities to real LLM/embedding consumers: aiEnrichment (external enrichment API + provider adapter, shared across entities), aiTagSuggestions (LLM prompt + surface on detail pages), aiInsightGeneration (LLM chain writing to {Contact,Account}AIInsight + surface), aiAutoReplyDrafting (contact inbox), aiIndustryInference (account-only LLM classifier that picks the best AccountIndustryOption), aiAccountScoring (account-only LLM scorer that writes to the Account score field).
completedTasks.dod: Each AI toggle reads the tenant flag from the matching AutomationSetting before consuming the chain; aiEnrichment (contact+account) backfills empty fields on create via a shared enrichment adapter; aiTagSuggestions renders suggestions on both detail pages; aiInsightGeneration writes to {Contact,Account}AIInsight (both models already exist) and renders on the detail page; aiAutoReplyDrafting drafts contact inbox replies (review-before-send); aiIndustryInference classifies an account against AccountIndustryOption vocabulary; aiAccountScoring writes to Account score + records provenance; >=90% scoped coverage on chain orchestration; AI safety guardrails per stoa-intelligence
completedTasks.kpis: Enrichment fill rate per entity; tag-suggestion acceptance rate; insight freshness (insights per active record); chain p95 <5s; Coverage >=90%
